MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Montgomery Partners is present. Represented by Joy Johnson.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant,Melinda Stube , is present.
Attorney, Matthew Gale , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-26-2010 is vacated.
